economic_notes: Joint controlled enterprise (Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Business Corporation Inc.) and limited partnership interests held at cost. Investments include E. Gagnon & Fils and Les Crevettiers Marinard Inc. Notre-Dame Land Inc. consolidated for first time in 2023.
notes: Comparative 2022 figures restated due to numerous ISC and Health Canada program adjustments. Notre-Dame Land Inc. consolidated for first time in 2023 with an accumulated deficit adjustment of $60,959. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Land Acquisition Corporation, Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Development Center, and Notre-Dame Land Inc. Land Settlement Trust Fund included as restricted cash with matching payable. ISC funding figure represents only the ISC balance from Due From Governments note; total government transfers calculated as sum of all four government transfer revenue lines. OSR includes Rent and Other revenue lines.
